description: Brazilian Institute of Geography and Statistics public APIs — population, municipalities, states, districts. Free and no key required.

city.notes: Municipality info by IBGE id (e.g. 3550308 = São Paulo capital). Returns name, microregion, mesoregion, state.

city-by-name.notes: Full list of all 5,570 BR municipalities. Heavy (~600KB) — caller should grep client-side or use the by-id endpoint when possible.

states.notes: All 27 BR states/DF. Includes id, sigla, nome, region.
